description: `ib-mcp.rabi.co` appears to be associated with an Interactive Brokers MCP-related project by Rabi. Public documentation discovered via search refers to a GitHub repository rather than developer interfaces hosted on `ib-mcp.rabi.co` itself.
summary: No public integration surfaces were found on `ib-mcp.rabi.co`; search results point to a GitHub-hosted open-source MCP project instead of documented APIs, MCP endpoints, GraphQL, or CLIs served from this domain.
